title: How to view template ids?
excerpt:
How do I enable developer mode to view template ids? 
The docs show I need to enable monday.labs, but I can’t that in my menu. 
Thank you.

posts.author: amit.lzkpa (Amit Nambiar)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I enable developer mode to view template ids?
The docs show I need to enable monday.labs, but I can’t that in my menu.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @amit.lzkpa - do you mind shoot me a PM with your email address and account slug? I can go ahead and enable that feature for you.

-Daniel
